wfPurpose: Because of the sensitivity of client data, we demonstrate safety before features
h2:
Counseling records must be handled safely —

before any AI ever touches them

team.title:
Protection principles designed

with domain experts
team.panelAriaLabel: Expert panel co-designing counseling record protection

be.desc: We structured storage and access controls so session records are never mixed with unrelated data.

sec.desc: We audited every point where client information could be exposed against industry standards.

ai.desc: We separated the processing pipeline so session records are never passed to AI training.

team.conclusionLabel: Our standard for protecting counseling records
team.conclusion: Encrypted before storage · No AI training · Strict access controls

enc.label: Encrypted before it's ever stored
enc.desc: Session records are encrypted before storage and kept only in protected form.

noai.label: Session records are never used to train AI
noai.desc: Records are used only for the task in front of them — they're never kept as AI training data.

mask.label: Sensitive information is masked before sharing
mask.desc: Information that could identify a client is masked by default and can only be revealed when needed.

encmini.sentence: Today's session notes have been securely organized.

maskmini.line1: Client <pii1>Jamie Carter</pii1> can be reached at <pii2>+1 555-0142</pii2>.
maskmini.line2: Affiliated with: <pii3>Downtown Counseling Center</pii3>, session in progress.
maskmini.hint: Sensitive information is only revealed when needed
